description: Google Cloud Integration Connectors lets users create and manage connections to Google Cloud services and third-party business applications. It is part of Google Cloud’s application integration tooling for working with connector definitions, connections, schemas, and related resources.
summary: connectors.googleapis.com exposes a Google Cloud REST API for Integration Connectors at https://connectors.googleapis.com, documented in Google Cloud docs with a public OpenAPI spec mirror for v2; authentication is via Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 access tokens, and Google API docs also show API-key query auth on the v2 spec mirror.
